message:
refactor(color): Improve code quality and documentation

- Add backticks to doc comments for type names (EightBit, TrueColor)
- Use nested or-patterns in system() method (clippy::unnested_or_patterns)
- Simplify downgrade() match with wildcard for self.clone() cases
- Add # Errors section to parse() documentation
- Use let-chains for cleaner cache access pattern
- Move regex static definitions to top of parse_uncached()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
